Init Containers:
  init-mysql:
    Container ID:  containerd://810646e9533e6792a6f7d7223b6f72ccdec9c19558d2b87df5e024531ee24f3d
    Image:         busybox:1.32
    Image ID:      docker.io/library/busybox@sha256:ae39a6f5c07297d7ab64dbd4f82c77c874cc6a94cea29fdec309d0992574b4f7
    Port:          <none>
    Host Port:     <none>
    Command:
      sh
      -c
    Args:
      # Generate mysql server-id from pod ordinal index.
      ordinal=$(echo $(hostname) | tr -cd "[0-9]")
      # Copy server-id.conf adding offset to avoid reserved server-id=0 value.
      cat /mnt/config-map/server-id.cnf | sed s/@@SERVER_ID@@/$((100 + $ordinal))/g > /mnt/conf.d/server-id.cnf
      # Copy appropriate conf.d files from config-map to config mount.
      cp -f /mnt/config-map/node.cnf /mnt/conf.d/
      cp -f /mnt/config-map/*.sh /mnt/scripts/
      chmod +x /mnt/scripts/*
      # remove lost+found.
      rm -rf /mnt/data/lost+found
      
    State:          Terminated
      Reason:       Completed
      Exit Code:    0
      Started:      Sun, 08 Mar 2026 15:16:39 +0800
      Finished:     Sun, 08 Mar 2026 15:16:39 +0800
    Ready:          True
    Restart Count:  0
    Environment:    <none>
    Mounts:
      /mnt/conf.d from conf (rw)
      /mnt/config-map from config-map (rw)
      /mnt/data from data (rw)
      /mnt/scripts from scripts (rw)
      /var/run/secrets/kubernetes.io/serviceaccount from kube-api-access-9h4s7 (ro)

    Container ID:  containerd://5efaae91133cd188a05cdfc369896b97dc0a957f2f5f9b8609368779ccfdf3c2
    Image:         busybox:1.32
    Image ID:      docker.io/library/busybox@sha256:ae39a6f5c07297d7ab64dbd4f82c77c874cc6a94cea29fdec309d0992574b4f7
    Port:          <none>
    Host Port:     <none>
    Command:
      sh
      -c
    Args:
      # Generate mysql server-id from pod ordinal index.
      ordinal=$(echo $(hostname) | tr -cd "[0-9]")
      # Copy server-id.conf adding offset to avoid reserved server-id=0 value.
      cat /mnt/config-map/server-id.cnf | sed s/@@SERVER_ID@@/$((100 + $ordinal))/g > /mnt/conf.d/server-id.cnf
      # Copy appropriate conf.d files from config-map to config mount.
      cp -f /mnt/config-map/node.cnf /mnt/conf.d/
      cp -f /mnt/config-map/*.sh /mnt/scripts/
      chmod +x /mnt/scripts/*
      # remove lost+found.
      rm -rf /mnt/data/lost+found

leader-stop.sh:
----
#!/usr/bin/env bash
curl -X PATCH -H "Authorization: Bearer $(cat /var/run/secrets/kubernetes.io/serviceaccount/token)" -H "Content-Type: application/json-patch+json" \
--cacert /var/run/secrets/kubernetes.io/serviceaccount/ca.crt https://$KUBERNETES_SERVICE_HOST:$KUBERNETES_PORT_443_TCP_PORT/api/v1/namespaces/train-ticket/pods/$HOSTNAME \
-d '[{"op": "replace", "path": "/metadata/labels/role", "value": "follower"}]'


node.cnf:

default_storage_engine=InnoDB
max_connections=65535

----
[mysqld]
server-id=@@SERVER_ID@@


create-peers.sh:
----
#!/bin/sh
set -eu
i=0
while [ $i -lt 3 ]
do
  if [ $i = 0 ]
  then
    echo -n "nacosdb-mysql-${i}.nacosdb-mysql.train-ticket:8801"
  else
    echo -n ",nacosdb-mysql-${i}.nacosdb-mysql.train-ticket:8801"
  fi
  i=$((i+1))
done

#!/bin/sh
set -eu
i=0

do

    echo -n "tsdb-mysql-${i}.tsdb-mysql.train-ticket:8801"
  else

  fi
  i=$((i+1))
done

#!/usr/bin/env bash
curl -X PATCH -H "Authorization: Bearer $(cat /var/run/secrets/kubernetes.io/serviceaccount/token)" -H "Content-Type: application/json-patch+json" \
--cacert /var/run/secrets/kubernetes.io/serviceaccount/ca.crt https://$KUBERNETES_SERVICE_HOST:$KUBERNETES_PORT_443_TCP_PORT/api/v1/namespaces/train-ticket/pods/$HOSTNAME \
-d '[{"op": "replace", "path": "/metadata/labels/role", "value": "leader"}]'

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  namespace: train-ticket
  name: ts-assurance-service
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: ts-assurance-service
  replicas: 1
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: ts-assurance-service
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: ts-assurance-service
        image: ghcr.io/sregym/ts-assurance-service:latest
        imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
        env:
        - name: SPRING_MAIN_ALLOW_CIRCULAR_REFERENCES
          value: 'true'
        - name: NODE_IP
          valueFrom:
            fieldRef:
              fieldPath: status.hostIP
        envFrom:
        - secretRef:
            name: ts-assurance-mysql
        - configMapRef:
            name: nacos
        ports:
        - containerPort: 18888
        resources:
          requests:
            cpu: 200m
            memory: 350Mi
          limits:
            cpu: 500m
            memory: 512Mi
        readinessProbe:
          tcpSocket:
            port: 18888
          initialDelaySeconds: 60
          periodSeconds: 10
          timeoutSeconds: 5
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  namespace: train-ticket
  name: ts-assurance-service
spec:
  ports:
  - name: http
    port: 18888
  selector:
    app: ts-assurance-service
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Secret
metadata:
  namespace: train-ticket
  name: ts-assurance-mysql

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  namespace: train-ticket
  name: ts-user-service
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: ts-user-service
  replicas: 1
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: ts-user-service
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: ts-user-service
        image: ghcr.io/sregym/ts-user-service:latest
        imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
        env:
        - name: SPRING_MAIN_ALLOW_CIRCULAR_REFERENCES
          value: 'true'
        - name: NODE_IP
          valueFrom:
            fieldRef:
              fieldPath: status.hostIP
        envFrom:
        - secretRef:
            name: ts-user-mysql
        - configMapRef:
            name: nacos
        ports:
        - containerPort: 12342
        resources:
          requests:
            cpu: 200m
            memory: 350Mi
          limits:
            cpu: 500m
            memory: 512Mi
        readinessProbe:
          tcpSocket:
            port: 12342
          initialDelaySeconds: 60
          periodSeconds: 10
          timeoutSeconds: 5
---

  ports:
  - name: http
    port: 12342
  selector:
    app: ts-user-service

      ordinal=$(echo $(hostname) | tr -cd "[0-9]")

      cp -f /mnt/config-map/node.cnf /mnt/conf.d/

Name:               tsdb-mysql
Namespace:          train-ticket

Selector:           app=tsdb-mysql,release=tsdb
Labels:             app=tsdb-mysql
                    app.kubernetes.io/managed-by=Helm

  Partition:        0

Pod Template:
  Labels:           app=tsdb-mysql
                    release=tsdb
                    role=candidate
  Annotations:      checksum/config: dd4963089c3241784e09150ea66f874f878381782b9af9f81a95a7f10a08ba8f
  Service Account:  tsdb-mysql
  Init Containers:
   init-mysql:
    Image:      busybox:1.32
    Port:       <none>
    Host Port:  <none>
    Command:
      sh
      -c
    Args:
      # Generate mysql server-id from pod ordinal index.
      ordinal=$(echo $(hostname) | tr -cd "[0-9]")
      # Copy server-id.conf adding offset to avoid reserved server-id=0 value.
      cat /mnt/config-map/server-id.cnf | sed s/@@SERVER_ID@@/$((100 + $ordinal))/g > /mnt/conf.d/server-id.cnf
      # Copy appropriate conf.d files from config-map to config mount.
      cp -f /mnt/config-map/node.cnf /mnt/conf.d/
      cp -f /mnt/config-map/*.sh /mnt/scripts/
      chmod +x /mnt/scripts/*
      # remove lost+found.
      rm -rf /mnt/data/lost+found
      
    Environment:  <none>
    Mounts:
      /mnt/conf.d from conf (rw)
      /mnt/config-map from config-map (rw)
      /mnt/data from data (rw)
      /mnt/scripts from scripts (rw)
  Containers:
   mysql:
    Image:      radondb/percona:5.7.34
    Port:       3306/TCP
    Host Port:  0/TCP
    Limits:
      cpu:     500m
      memory:  1Gi
    Requests:
      cpu:      100m
      memory:   256Mi
    Liveness:   exec [sh -c mysqladmin ping -uroot] delay=30s timeout=5s period=10s #success=1 #failure=3
    Readiness:  exec [sh -c mysql -uroot -e "SELECT 1"] delay=10s timeout=1s period=10s #success=1 #failure=3
    Environment:
      MYSQL_REPL_PASSWORD:  <set to the key 'mysql-replication-password' in secret 'tsdb-mysql'>  Optional: false
      MYSQL_DATABASE:       ts
      MYSQL_USER:           ts
      MYSQL_PASSWORD:       <set to the key 'mysql-password' in secret 'tsdb-mysql'>  Optional: false
    Mounts:
      /etc/mysql/conf.d from conf (rw)
      /var/lib/mysql from data (rw)
      /var/log/mysql from logs (rw)
   xenon:
    Image:      radondb/xenon:1.1.5-helm
    Port:       8801/TCP
    Host Port:  0/TCP
    Limits:
      cpu:     100m
      memory:  256Mi
    Requests:
      cpu:      50m
      memory:   128Mi
    Liveness:   exec [pgrep xenon] delay=30s timeout=5s period=10s #success=1 #failure=3
    Readiness:  exec [sh -c xenoncli xenon ping] delay=10s timeout=1s period=10s #success=1 #failure=3
    Environment:
      MYSQL_REPL_PASSWORD:  <set to the key 'mysql-replication-password' in secret 'tsdb-mysql'>  Optional: false
      POD_HOSTNAME:          (v1:metadata.name)
      HOST:                 $(POD_HOSTNAME).tsdb-mysql.train-ticket
      LEADER_START_CMD:     /scripts/leader-start.sh
      LEADER_STOP_CMD:      /scripts/leader-stop.sh
      Master_SysVars:       sync_binlog=default;innodb_flush_log_at_trx_commit=default
      Slave_SysVars:        sync_binlog=1000;innodb_flush_log_at_trx_commit=1
    Mounts:

          failureThreshold: 3

        resources:

        - mountPath: /var/lib/mysql
          name: data
        - mountPath: /etc/mysql/conf.d
          name: conf

          name: logs
      - env:

          valueFrom:
            secretKeyRef:

              name: nacosdb-mysql

          valueFrom:
            fieldRef:
              apiVersion: v1
              fieldPath: metadata.name
        - name: HOST
          value: $(POD_HOSTNAME).nacosdb-mysql.train-ticket
        - name: LEADER_START_CMD
          value: /scripts/leader-start.sh
        - name: LEADER_STOP_CMD
          value: /scripts/leader-stop.sh
        - name: Master_SysVars
          value: sync_binlog=default;innodb_flush_log_at_trx_commit=default
        - name: Slave_SysVars
          value: sync_binlog=1000;innodb_flush_log_at_trx_commit=1
        image: radondb/xenon:1.1.5-helm
        imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
        lifecycle:
          postStart:
            exec:
              command:
              - sh
              - -c
              - until (xenoncli xenon ping && xenoncli cluster add "$(/scripts/create-peers.sh)")
                > /dev/null 2>&1; do sleep 2; done
        livenessProbe:
          exec:
            command:
            - pgrep
            - xenon
          failureThreshold: 3
          initialDelaySeconds: 30
          periodSeconds: 10
          successThreshold: 1
          timeoutSeconds: 5
        name: xenon

        - containerPort: 8801
          name: xenon
          protocol: TCP
        readinessProbe:
          exec:

            - -c
            - xenoncli xenon ping
          failureThreshold: 3
          initialDelaySeconds: 10
          periodSeconds: 10
          successThreshold: 1
          timeoutSeconds: 1
        resources:

            memory: 256Mi
          requests:
            cpu: 50m
            memory: 128Mi
        terminationMessagePath: /dev/termination-log
        terminationMessagePolicy: File
        volumeMounts:
        - mountPath: /scripts
          name: scripts
      - command:
        - tail
        - -f
        - /logs/mysql-slow.log
        image: busybox:1.32
        imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
        name: slowlog
        resources: {}
        terminationMessagePath: /dev/termination-log
        terminationMessagePolicy: File
        volumeMounts:
        - mountPath: /logs
          name: logs
      dnsPolicy: ClusterFirst
      initContainers:
      - args:
        - |
          # Generate mysql server-id from pod ordinal index.
          ordinal=$(echo $(hostname) | tr -cd "[0-9]")
          # Copy server-id.conf adding offset to avoid reserved server-id=0 value.
          cat /mnt/config-map/server-id.cnf | sed s/@@SERVER_ID@@/$((100 + $ordinal))/g > /mnt/conf.d/server-id.cnf
          # Copy appropriate conf.d files from config-map to config mount.
          cp -f /mnt/config-map/node.cnf /mnt/conf.d/
          cp -f /mnt/config-map/*.sh /mnt/scripts/
          chmod +x /mnt/scripts/*
          # remove lost+found.
          rm -rf /mnt/data/lost+found
        command:
        - sh
        - -c
        image: busybox:1.32
        imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
        name: init-mysql
        resources: {}
        terminationMessagePath: /dev/termination-log
        terminationMessagePolicy: File
        volumeMounts:
        - mountPath: /mnt/conf.d
          name: conf
        - mountPath: /mnt/scripts
          name: scripts
        - mountPath: /mnt/config-map
          name: config-map
        - mountPath: /mnt/data
          name: data
      restartPolicy: Always
      schedulerName: default-scheduler
      securityContext: {}
      serviceAccount: nacosdb-mysql
      serviceAccountName: nacosdb-mysql
      terminationGracePeriodSeconds: 30
      volumes:
      - emptyDir: {}
        name: conf
      - emptyDir: {}
        name: scripts
      - emptyDir: {}
        name: logs
      - configMap:
          defaultMode: 420
          name: nacosdb-mysql
        name: config-map

              key: mysql-replication-password
              name: tsdb-mysql
        - name: POD_HOSTNAME
          valueFrom:
            fieldRef:
              apiVersion: v1
              fieldPath: metadata.name
        - name: HOST
          value: $(POD_HOSTNAME).tsdb-mysql.train-ticket
        - name: LEADER_START_CMD
          value: /scripts/leader-start.sh
        - name: LEADER_STOP_CMD
          value: /scripts/leader-stop.sh
        - name: Master_SysVars
          value: sync_binlog=default;innodb_flush_log_at_trx_commit=default
        - name: Slave_SysVars
          value: sync_binlog=1000;innodb_flush_log_at_trx_commit=1
        image: radondb/xenon:1.1.5-helm
        imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
        lifecycle:
          postStart:
            exec:
              command:
              - sh
              - -c
              - until (xenoncli xenon ping && xenoncli cluster add "$(/scripts/create-peers.sh)")
                > /dev/null 2>&1; do sleep 2; done
        livenessProbe:
          exec:
            command:
            - pgrep
            - xenon
          failureThreshold: 3
          initialDelaySeconds: 30
          periodSeconds: 10
          successThreshold: 1
          timeoutSeconds: 5
        name: xenon
        ports:
        - containerPort: 8801
          name: xenon
          protocol: TCP
        readinessProbe:
          exec:
            command:
            - sh
            - -c
            - xenoncli xenon ping
          failureThreshold: 3
          initialDelaySeconds: 10
          periodSeconds: 10
          successThreshold: 1
          timeoutSeconds: 1
        resources:
          limits:
            cpu: 100m
            memory: 256Mi
          requests:
            cpu: 50m
            memory: 128Mi
        terminationMessagePath: /dev/termination-log
        terminationMessagePolicy: File
        volumeMounts:
        - mountPath: /scripts
          name: scripts
      - command:
        - tail
        - -f
        - /logs/mysql-slow.log
        image: busybox:1.32
        imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
        name: slowlog
        resources: {}
        terminationMessagePath: /dev/termination-log
        terminationMessagePolicy: File
        volumeMounts:
        - mountPath: /logs
          name: logs
      dnsPolicy: ClusterFirst
      initContainers:
      - args:
        - |
          # Generate mysql server-id from pod ordinal index.
          ordinal=$(echo $(hostname) | tr -cd "[0-9]")
          # Copy server-id.conf adding offset to avoid reserved server-id=0 value.
          cat /mnt/config-map/server-id.cnf | sed s/@@SERVER_ID@@/$((100 + $ordinal))/g > /mnt/conf.d/server-id.cnf
          # Copy appropriate conf.d files from config-map to config mount.
          cp -f /mnt/config-map/node.cnf /mnt/conf.d/
          cp -f /mnt/config-map/*.sh /mnt/scripts/
          chmod +x /mnt/scripts/*
          # remove lost+found.
          rm -rf /mnt/data/lost+found
        command:
        - sh
        - -c
        image: busybox:1.32
        imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
        name: init-mysql
        resources: {}
        terminationMessagePath: /dev/termination-log
        terminationMessagePolicy: File
        volumeMounts:
        - mountPath: /mnt/conf.d
          name: conf
        - mountPath: /mnt/scripts
          name: scripts
        - mountPath: /mnt/config-map
          name: config-map
        - mountPath: /mnt/data
          name: data
      restartPolicy: Always
      schedulerName: default-scheduler
      securityContext: {}
      serviceAccount: tsdb-mysql
      serviceAccountName: tsdb-mysql
      terminationGracePeriodSeconds: 30
      volumes:
      - emptyDir: {}
        name: conf
      - emptyDir: {}
        name: scripts
      - emptyDir: {}
        name: logs
      - configMap:
          defaultMode: 420
          name: tsdb-mysql
        name: config-map
  updateStrategy:
    rollingUpdate:
      partition: 0
    type: RollingUpdate
  volumeClaimTemplates:
  - apiVersion: v1
    kind: PersistentVolumeClaim
    metadata:
      creationTimestamp: null
      name: data
    spec:
      accessModes:
      - ReadWriteOnce
      resources:
        requests:
          storage: 1Gi
      volumeMode: Filesystem
    status:
      phase: Pending

apiVersion: v1
data:
  create-peers.sh: |
    #!/bin/sh
    set -eu
    i=0
    while [ $i -lt 3 ]
    do
      if [ $i = 0 ]
      then
        echo -n "nacosdb-mysql-${i}.nacosdb-mysql.train-ticket:8801"
      else
        echo -n ",nacosdb-mysql-${i}.nacosdb-mysql.train-ticket:8801"
      fi
      i=$((i+1))
    done
  leader-start.sh: |
    #!/usr/bin/env bash
    curl -X PATCH -H "Authorization: Bearer $(cat /var/run/secrets/kubernetes.io/serviceaccount/token)" -H "Content-Type: application/json-patch+json" \
    --cacert /var/run/secrets/kubernetes.io/serviceaccount/ca.crt https://$KUBERNETES_SERVICE_HOST:$KUBERNETES_PORT_443_TCP_PORT/api/v1/namespaces/train-ticket/pods/$HOSTNAME \
    -d '[{"op": "replace", "path": "/metadata/labels/role", "value": "leader"}]'
  leader-stop.sh: |
    #!/usr/bin/env bash
    curl -X PATCH -H "Authorization: Bearer $(cat /var/run/secrets/kubernetes.io/serviceaccount/token)" -H "Content-Type: application/json-patch+json" \
    --cacert /var/run/secrets/kubernetes.io/serviceaccount/ca.crt https://$KUBERNETES_SERVICE_HOST:$KUBERNETES_PORT_443_TCP_PORT/api/v1/namespaces/train-ticket/pods/$HOSTNAME \
    -d '[{"op": "replace", "path": "/metadata/labels/role", "value": "follower"}]'
  node.cnf: |
    [mysqld]
    default_storage_engine=InnoDB
    max_connections=65535
  server-id.cnf: |
    [mysqld]
    server-id=@@SERVER_ID@@
